task_name: Statistical Analysis of Sleep and Screen Time

subtask1.query: Based on the 28-day personal data in context/data.csv, complete a statistical analysis of sleep duration and screen time, including: data visualization (at least one of scatter plot, distribution plot/box plot), parameter estimation (mean, standard deviation, quartiles, and normal distribution parameter estimation with 95% confidence intervals for both sleep and screen time), correlation analysis (Pearson correlation coefficient and significance test), and output a structured analysis report (Markdown or PDF). Save all output files in the working directory.
deliverables: analysis.py - Main data processing and statistical analysis script
visualizations/ - Generated charts (e.g., scatter.png, hist_sleep.png, hist_screen.png, or boxplot.png)
metrics.json - Key statistical results (means, variances, confidence intervals, correlation coefficients, etc.)
